meta.defaultTitle: BugReel — AI-Powered Bug Reporting from Screen Recordings
meta.defaultDescription: Record a bug, get a complete report. BugReel uses AI to turn screen recordings into detailed bug reports with steps, screenshots, and priority — in minutes, not hours.

hero.headline: Record a bug. Get a complete report. Automatically.
hero.subheadline: BugReel uses AI to turn screen recordings into detailed bug reports with steps, screenshots, and priority — in minutes, not hours.
hero.demoAlt: BugReel demo — recording a bug and generating a report

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From screen recording to bug report in three steps.
howItWorks.step1Description: Install the Chrome extension, click Record, reproduce the bug, and stop. That's it.
howItWorks.step2Description: Speech transcription, context analysis, automatic key frame extraction, and severity assessment — all in seconds.
howItWorks.step3Description: Review the generated card, tweak if needed, and export to your tracker with one click. Done.

features.title: Built for Modern Teams
features.subtitle: Everything you need to capture, understand, and route bugs — without writing a single line in the report.

aiAnalysis.title: AI-Powered Analysis
aiAnalysis.description: Automatic transcription, step extraction, and severity assessment from your recording.

smartScreenshots.title: Smart Screenshots
smartScreenshots.description: Key frames extracted at exactly the right moments. No manual screenshots needed.

oneClickExport.title: One-Click Export
oneClickExport.description: Send to Jira, Linear, GitHub Issues, YouTrack, or any tracker via webhook.

selfHosted.title: Self-Hosted
selfHosted.description: Your data stays on your server. One-command Docker setup, full control.

complexityScoring.title: Complexity Scoring
complexityScoring.description: 5-dimension scoring system for accurate task estimation and sprint planning.

consoleCapture.title: Console & Action Capture
consoleCapture.description: JS errors, user clicks, URL changes — all captured and synced to the recording timeline.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Export bug reports directly to the tools your team already uses.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale when you need to.

team.name: Team

features: Jira, Linear, GitHub Issues, YouTrack export

comparison.title: How BugReel Compares
comparison.subtitle: See how BugReel stacks up against other bug reporting tools.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about BugReel.

items.question: Is BugReel really free?
items.answer: The Community edition is free and open source under the BSL (Business Source License). It includes AI analysis, smart screenshots, and Webhook + YouTrack export for up to 5 users. For Jira, Linear, and GitHub Issues integration, the Team plan starts at $8/user/month.

items.question: Where is my data stored?
items.answer: BugReel is self-hosted — all data stays on your own server. Recordings, transcriptions, and reports never leave your infrastructure. You have full control over your data.

items.question: Which browsers are supported?
items.answer: The BugReel Chrome extension works on all Chromium-based browsers: Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, Brave, Arc, and Opera. Firefox support is on the roadmap for 2026. Safari has technical limitations with screen recording APIs.

items.question: Can I use my own OpenAI API key?
items.answer: Absolutely. BugReel supports bring-your-own-key for OpenAI, and also works with any OpenAI-compatible API (Azure OpenAI, local models via Ollama, etc.). This gives you full control over costs and data privacy.

items.question: How does the AI analysis work?
items.answer: BugReel records your screen and audio, then processes the recording through multiple AI stages: speech-to-text transcription, visual analysis for key frame extraction, step-by-step reproduction path generation, and severity/complexity assessment. The entire pipeline runs in minutes, not hours.

items.question: What issue trackers are supported?
items.answer: The Community edition includes Webhook and YouTrack export. The Team plan ($8/user/month) adds Jira, Linear, and GitHub Issues. You can also use the webhook integration to connect to any tool with an API — Asana, ClickUp, Notion, Trello, and more.

cta.title: Stop Writing Bug Reports Manually
cta.subtitle: Try BugReel free — self-hosted, open source, AI-powered.

footer.copyright: BugReel. Open source under BSL (Business Source License).
